//: Per-tool wrapper compile config (SF-1). Compiles catalog `wrapper.ts` files in place to `wrapper.js` so bare Node (node dist/index.js — no TS loader) can serve them. The gateway's main tsconfig only builds `src/`, so catalog wrappers need this separate step. The `ToolDescriptor` import is type-only and erases. Run from the gateway dir: `node_modules/.bin/tsc -p ../.agentsmesh/tools/tsconfig.wrapper.json`.
